mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bitable_table WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT * FROM bitable_table WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT * FROM bitable_table WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bitable_table (app_id, app_token, table_id, name, created_by, created_time) VALUES (#{appId}, #{appToken}, #{tableId}, #{name}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE bitable_table SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bitable_table WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND del_flag = '1'
mapper.update: UPDATE bitable_table SET del_flag = '0', updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE bitable_table SET del_flag = '1' WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId}
